title: Roasted Vegetable Huarache
description: A flavorful and healthy huarache dish loaded with roasted vegetables, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Toss huaraches with a drizzle of olive oil and season with salt. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
In a separate bowl, toss sliced snow peas, radish, and peas with a drizzle of olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 12-15 minutes, or until tender.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the huaraches by topping each tortilla with roasted vegetables, a sprinkle of cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice.
